heading: Definitions
label: 3192 Definitions
notes: Amendments1998—Pars. (3) to (5). inserted “and” at end of par. (3), redesignated par. (5) as (4), and struck out former par. (4) which read as follows: “the term ‘Board’ means the Animal Health Science Research Advisory Board; and”.Pub. L. 105–1851981—Par. (1). substituted “an accredited school or college of veterinary medicine or a State agricultural research experiment station that conducts animal health and disease research” for “any college or university having an accredited college of veterinary medicine or a department of veterinary science or animal pathology, or a similar unit conducting animal health and disease research in a State agricultural experiment station”.Pub. L. 97–98Par. (2). substituted “an accredited school or college of veterinary medicine” for “a college or university which qualifies as an eligible institution”.Pub. L. 97–98

children.text: the term “eligible institution” means an accredited school or college of veterinary medicine or a State agricultural experiment station that conducts animal health and disease research;
the term “dean” means the dean of an accredited school or college of veterinary medicine;
the term “director” means the director of a State agricultural experiment station which qualifies as an eligible institution; and
the term “animal health research capacity” means the capacity of an eligible institution to conduct animal health and disease research, as determined by the Secretary.
